requirement_topic.en: UKCA Marking, UK Responsible Person, and UK Declaration of Conformity (DoC)
requirement_topic.zh: UKCA标志、英国责任人及英国合格声明（DoC）
requirement_topic.zht: UKCA標誌、英國責任人及英國合格聲明（DoC）

summary.en: EV chargers placed on the Great Britain market (England, Scotland, Wales) may bear either UKCA (UK Conformity Assessed) or CE marking following the Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment) Regulations 2024 (effective 1 October 2024) and the Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025, under which CE marking continues to be accepted in Great Britain indefinitely alongside UKCA for most regulated product categories including electrical equipment. The previously planned UKCA-only mandate has been effectively shelved. The applicable UK legislation includes the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101, implementing LVD equivalents) and the Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091). Manufacturers outside the UK must appoint a UK Responsible Person (UKRP) — an importer or authorised representative established in the UK — whose name and address must appear on the product or its packaging. The manufacturer or UKRP must compile a UK Declaration of Conformity referencing the applicable UK statutory instruments and the designated standards applied, and retain a technical file for 10 years. Northern Ireland retains CE marking under the Windsor Framework (UKCA not required there). [UNVERIFIED — verify current UKCA/CE dual-acceptance status and any sector-specific requirements on legislation.gov.uk or OPSS guidance]
summary.zh: 投放大不列颠市场（英格兰、苏格兰、威尔士）的电动汽车充电器，根据《2024年产品安全与计量等（修订）条例》（2024年10月1日生效）及《2025年产品监管与计量法》，可加贴UKCA（英国合格评定）或CE标志。上述立法允许CE标志与UKCA在大不列颠无限期并行使用，适用于包括电气设备在内的大多数受管制产品类别，此前计划的UKCA专用强制要求已实际搁置。适用的英国法规包括《2016年电气设备（安全）条例》（SI 2016/1101，等同低压指令）及《2016年电磁兼容条例》（SI 2016/1091）。英国境外制造商须委任一名在英国境内设立的英国责任人（UKRP）——即进口商或授权代表——其姓名及地址须标注于产品或包装上。制造商或UKRP须编制英国合格声明，引用适用的英国法定文书及所采用的指定标准，并将技术文件保存10年。北爱尔兰根据《温莎框架》继续保留CE标志（无需UKCA标志）。[UNVERIFIED — 请在legislation.gov.uk或OPSS指引核实当前UKCA/CE并行接受状态及任何行业特定要求]
summary.zht: 投放大不列顛市場（英格蘭、蘇格蘭、威爾士）的電動汽車充電器，根據《2024年產品安全與計量等（修訂）條例》（2024年10月1日生效）及《2025年產品監管與計量法》，可加貼UKCA（英國合格評定）或CE標誌。上述立法允許CE標誌與UKCA在大不列顛無限期並行使用，適用於包括電氣設備在內的大多數受管制產品類別，此前計劃的UKCA專用強制要求已實際擱置。適用的英國法規包括《2016年電氣設備（安全）條例》（SI 2016/1101，等同低壓指令）及《2016年電磁相容條例》（SI 2016/1091）。英國境外製造商須委任一名在英國境內設立的英國責任人（UKRP）——即進口商或授權代表——其姓名及地址須標注於產品或包裝上。製造商或UKRP須編製英國合格聲明，引用適用的英國法定文書及所採用的指定標準，並將技術文件保存10年。北愛爾蘭根據《溫莎框架》繼續保留CE標誌（無需UKCA標誌）。[UNVERIFIED — 請在legislation.gov.uk或OPSS指引核實當前UKCA/CE並行接受狀態及任何行業特定要求]

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101)
Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091)
Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment etc.) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (SI 2019/696) [UNVERIFIED — verify consolidation status]
Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment) Regulations 2024 (SI 2024/[effective 1 Oct 2024]) — CE marking accepted in GB indefinitely alongside UKCA
Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025 — confirms ongoing CE/UKCA dual acceptance
Windsor Framework (Northern Ireland CE marking retention)

summary.en: In China, EV chargers require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) under GB/T 18487.1 (AC charging system) and GB/T 20234 series (connector standards). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification; there is no self-declaration equivalent to the UK DoC, and no Chinese statutory concept of a designated in-country responsible person for export-bound products. The CCC regime is administered by SAMR and accredited by CNCA.
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电器须依据GB/T 18487.1（交流充电系统）及GB/T 20234系列（接口标准）通过中国强制认证（CCC）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，没有相当于英国合格声明的自我声明制度，且中国法规中不存在针对出口产品须在目标市场指定境内责任人的对应概念。CCC制度由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）主管，由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）授权。
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電器須依據GB/T 18487.1（交流充電系統）及GB/T 20234系列（接口標準）通過中國強制認證（CCC）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，沒有相當於英國合格聲明的自我聲明制度，且中國法規中不存在針對出口產品須在目標市場指定境內責任人的對應概念。CCC制度由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）主管，由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）授權。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 (AC EV charging system)
GB/T 20234.1-2015 (general requirements for connectors)
GB/T 20234.2-2015 (AC charging interface)
GB/T 20234.3-2015 (DC charging interface)
CCC certification (CNCA mandatory)

gap.en: Three compounding gaps exist for Chinese manufacturers targeting the GB market: (1) UKCA or CE marking — both are now accepted in Great Britain indefinitely following the Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment) Regulations 2024 and Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025; CE marking alone is therefore accepted for GB market goods. (2) A UK Responsible Person established in Great Britain must be named on the product regardless of which marking is used — no Chinese-domestic equivalent obligation exists; (3) A UK Declaration of Conformity distinct from any EU DoC must be drafted and signed. CCC certification provides no pathway toward requirements (2) or (3). [UNVERIFIED — verify current UKCA/CE dual-acceptance details and any product-specific requirements on legislation.gov.uk or OPSS guidance]
gap.zh: 针对大不列颠市场的中国制造商面临三项叠加差距：（1）UKCA或CE标志——根据《2024年产品安全与计量等（修订）条例》及《2025年产品监管与计量法》，两者目前均在大不列颠无限期获接受；因此CE标志本身已获大不列颠市场接受。（2）无论使用哪种标志，须在产品上标注一名在大不列颠境内设立的英国责任人——中国国内没有对应的强制义务；（3）须另行起草并签署有别于欧盟合格声明的英国合格声明。CCC认证对要求（2）或（3）均无帮助。[UNVERIFIED — 请在legislation.gov.uk或OPSS指引核实当前UKCA/CE并行接受状态及任何特定产品要求]
gap.zht: 針對大不列顛市場的中國製造商面臨三項疊加差距：（1）UKCA或CE標誌——根據《2024年產品安全與計量等（修訂）條例》及《2025年產品監管與計量法》，兩者目前均在大不列顛無限期獲接受；因此CE標誌本身已獲大不列顛市場接受。（2）無論使用哪種標誌，須在產品上標注一名在大不列顛境內設立的英國責任人——中國國內沒有對應的強制義務；（3）須另行起草並簽署有別於歐盟合格聲明的英國合格聲明。CCC認證對要求（2）或（3）均無幫助。[UNVERIFIED — 請在legislation.gov.uk或OPSS指引核實當前UKCA/CE並行接受狀態及任何特定產品要求]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Great Britain market access — UKCA or CE marking accepted (Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment) Regulations 2024 + Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025); UK Responsible Person and UK DoC required; Northern Ireland retains CE under Windsor Framework
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — CCC applies to China domestic market only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A UK Responsible Person established in Great Britain and a UK Declaration of Conformity are mandatory for GB market access. CE marking is accepted in Great Britain (alongside UKCA) following the Product Safety and Metrology etc. (Amendment) Regulations 2024 and Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025 — the UKCA-only mandate has been effectively shelved. CCC certification provides no credit toward the UKRP appointment or UK DoC requirement. Chinese manufacturers must appoint a UK-established UKRP and prepare a UK DoC before shipping to Great Britain. [UNVERIFIED — confirm current UKCA/CE acceptance status and any active requirements at legislation.gov.uk or OPSS before relying on this for compliance planning]
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在大不列颠境内设立的英国责任人及英国合格声明是进入大不列颠市场的强制门槛。根据《2024年产品安全与计量等（修订）条例》及《2025年产品监管与计量法》，CE标志在大不列颠与UKCA并行获接受——UKCA专用强制要求已实际搁置。CCC认证对UKRP委任或英国合格声明要求均无帮助。中国制造商须在向大不列颠发货前委任在英国境内设立的英国责任人并准备英国合格声明。[UNVERIFIED — 在将此内容用于合规规划前，请在legislation.gov.uk或OPSS确认当前UKCA/CE接受状态及任何有效要求]
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在大不列顛境內設立的英國責任人及英國合格聲明是進入大不列顛市場的強制門檻。根據《2024年產品安全與計量等（修訂）條例》及《2025年產品監管與計量法》，CE標誌在大不列顛與UKCA並行獲接受——UKCA專用強制要求已實際擱置。CCC認證對UKRP委任或英國合格聲明要求均無幫助。中國製造商須在向大不列顛發貨前委任在英國境內設立的英國責任人並準備英國合格聲明。[UNVERIFIED — 在將此內容用於合規規劃前，請在legislation.gov.uk或OPSS確認當前UKCA/CE接受狀態及任何有效要求]

requirement_topic.en: OZEV Grant Approved-Chargepoint List (EV Chargepoint Grant / Workplace Charging Scheme) and Smart Charge Points Regulations 2021
requirement_topic.zh: OZEV补贴核准充电器名单（电动汽车充电点补贴/工作场所充电计划）及《2021年智能充电点条例》
requirement_topic.zht: OZEV補貼核准充電器名單（電動汽車充電點補貼/工作場所充電計劃）及《2021年智能充電點條例》

summary.en: Two distinct but related UK market-access mechanisms apply beyond product safety marking. First, the Office for Zero Emission Vehicles (OZEV) administers grant schemes — the EV Chargepoint Grant (for homeowners and renters) and the Workplace Charging Scheme (WCS) — that fund installation of approved charge points. Critically, only charge point models listed on the OZEV approved-chargepoint list are eligible; installers must use a listed model or the grant is refused. Inclusion on the list requires the manufacturer to submit an application to OZEV demonstrating conformity with grant eligibility criteria (which include smart charging capability, UKCA/safety compliance, and minimum technical specifications set by OZEV). Second, the Electric Vehicles (Smart Charge Points) Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/1brilliance [UNVERIFIED — confirm SI number on legislation.gov.uk]) mandates that all new private EV charge points sold or installed in Great Britain must be smart charge points, with specific requirements for: demand-side response (off-peak default charging), randomised delay, security requirements aligned with ETSI EN 303 645 [UNVERIFIED — verify exact standard referenced], and a compliance statement to be submitted to the Secretary of State. These Regulations apply to manufacturers and importers from 30 June 2022 [UNVERIFIED — confirm date]. [UNVERIFIED — verify SI number, exact compliance statement process, and current OZEV approved-list application procedure at gov.uk/ozev]
summary.zh: 除产品安全标志外，还适用两项不同但相关的英国市场准入机制。其一，零排放车辆办公室（OZEV）管理补贴计划——电动汽车充电点补贴（面向业主和租户）及工作场所充电计划（WCS）——用于资助安装核准充电点。关键在于，仅列入OZEV核准充电器名单的充电点型号方可享受补贴；安装商须使用名单内型号，否则补贴申请将被拒绝。纳入名单须由制造商向OZEV提交申请，证明符合补贴资格标准（包括智能充电能力、UKCA/安全合规及OZEV规定的最低技术规格）。其二，《2021年电动汽车（智能充电点）条例》（SI 2021/[UNVERIFIED — 请在legislation.gov.uk核实条例编号]）规定，在大不列颠销售或安装的所有新型私用电动汽车充电点须为智能充电点，具体要求包括：需求侧响应（默认低峰充电）、随机延迟、符合ETSI EN 303 645的安全要求[UNVERIFIED — 核实所引用的确切标准]，以及须向国务大臣提交合规声明。上述条例自2022年6月30日起适用于制造商和进口商[UNVERIFIED — 核实日期]。[UNVERIFIED — 请在gov.uk/ozev核实条例编号、合规声明的确切程序及当前OZEV核准名单申请流程]
summary.zht: 除產品安全標誌外，還適用兩項不同但相關的英國市場準入機制。其一，零排放車輛辦公室（OZEV）管理補貼計劃——電動汽車充電點補貼（面向業主和租戶）及工作場所充電計劃（WCS）——用於資助安裝核准充電點。關鍵在於，僅列入OZEV核准充電器名單的充電點型號方可享受補貼；安裝商須使用名單內型號，否則補貼申請將被拒絕。納入名單須由製造商向OZEV提交申請，證明符合補貼資格標準（包括智能充電能力、UKCA/安全合規及OZEV規定的最低技術規格）。其二，《2021年電動汽車（智能充電點）條例》（SI 2021/[UNVERIFIED — 請在legislation.gov.uk核實條例編號]）規定，在大不列顛銷售或安裝的所有新型私用電動汽車充電點須為智能充電點，具體要求包括：需求側響應（默認低峰充電）、隨機延遲、符合ETSI EN 303 645的安全要求[UNVERIFIED — 核實所引用的確切標準]，以及須向國務大臣提交合規聲明。上述條例自2022年6月30日起適用於製造商和進口商[UNVERIFIED — 核實日期]。[UNVERIFIED — 請在gov.uk/ozev核實條例編號、合規聲明的確切程序及當前OZEV核准名單申請流程]

standards_or_laws: Electric Vehicles (Smart Charge Points) Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/[UNVERIFIED — confirm SI number])
OZEV EV Chargepoint Grant — approved-chargepoint list eligibility criteria (gov.uk/ozev) [UNVERIFIED — verify current criteria version]
Workplace Charging Scheme (WCS) — OZEV approved model requirement
ETSI EN 303 645 (Cyber Security for Consumer IoT) [UNVERIFIED — verify if this is the exact standard referenced in Smart Charge Points Regs]
Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101) — underpins UKCA requirement for charger hardware
Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091)

summary.en: China has no regulatory equivalent to the OZEV approved-chargepoint list or the Smart Charge Points Regulations 2021. Chinese EV charger subsidy and procurement programmes (e.g., local government charging infrastructure subsidies, State Grid procurement) use domestic tendering and technical standards (primarily GB/T series) as gatekeeping mechanisms, but these are procurement-route requirements rather than product-safety or smart-charging mandates that parallel UK law. There is no Chinese smart-charge-point cyber-security compliance statement regime equivalent to the UK Smart Charge Points Regulations.
summary.zh: 中国没有与OZEV核准充电器名单或《2021年智能充电点条例》相对应的监管制度。中国电动汽车充电器补贴及采购计划（如地方政府充电基础设施补贴、国家电网采购）以国内招投标及技术标准（主要为GB/T系列）作为准入机制，但这些属于采购路径要求，而非类似英国法律的产品安全或智能充电强制规定。中国目前没有相当于英国《智能充电点条例》的智能充电点网络安全合规声明制度。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與OZEV核准充電器名單或《2021年智能充電點條例》相對應的監管制度。中國電動汽車充電器補貼及採購計劃（如地方政府充電基礎設施補貼、國家電網採購）以國內招投標及技術標準（主要為GB/T系列）作為準入機制，但這些屬於採購路徑要求，而非類似英國法律的產品安全或智能充電強制規定。中國目前沒有相當於英國《智能充電點條例》的智能充電點網絡安全合規聲明制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 (AC EV charging system)
GB/T 34657.1-2017 (EV conductive charging interoperability — AC)
No direct equivalent to OZEV approved-list or Smart Charge Points Regs

gap.en: Two compounding commercial and regulatory gaps exist: (1) OZEV approved-chargepoint list — this is a commercial market gate: chargers not on the list cannot be sold through grant-supported installation channels (which dominate UK residential and workplace charging uptake). Chinese manufacturers must proactively apply to OZEV for model approval; there is no mutual recognition with any Chinese certification. (2) Smart Charge Points Regulations 2021 — all new private charge points sold or installed in GB must be smart, meeting demand-side response, randomised delay, and cyber-security requirements; a compliance statement must be submitted to government. Chinese market chargers typically lack the demand-side response and ETSI EN 303 645-aligned cyber security controls required. This is a product-design and compliance-documentation gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. [UNVERIFIED — verify exact Smart Charge Points Regulations SI number, compliance statement submission process, and current OZEV approved-list criteria at gov.uk before using for compliance planning]
gap.zh: 存在两项叠加的商业及监管差距：（1）OZEV核准充电器名单——这是一道商业市场门槛：未列入名单的充电器无法通过补贴支持的安装渠道销售（该渠道主导英国住宅及工作场所充电市场）。中国制造商须主动向OZEV申请型号核准；中国任何认证均不享有互认安排。（2）《2021年智能充电点条例》——在大不列颠销售或安装的所有新型私用充电点须为智能充电点，须满足需求侧响应、随机延迟及网络安全要求，并须向政府提交合规声明。中国市场充电器通常缺乏所要求的需求侧响应功能及符合ETSI EN 303 645的网络安全控制措施，存在产品设计及合规文件方面的差距，且在中国监管体系中无对应规定。[UNVERIFIED — 在用于合规规划前，请在gov.uk核实《智能充电点条例》的确切条例编号、合规声明提交程序及当前OZEV核准名单标准]
gap.zht: 存在兩項疊加的商業及監管差距：（1）OZEV核准充電器名單——這是一道商業市場門檻：未列入名單的充電器無法透過補貼支持的安裝渠道銷售（該渠道主導英國住宅及工作場所充電市場）。中國製造商須主動向OZEV申請型號核准；中國任何認證均不享有互認安排。（2）《2021年智能充電點條例》——在大不列顛銷售或安裝的所有新型私用充電點須為智能充電點，須滿足需求側響應、隨機延遲及網絡安全要求，並須向政府提交合規聲明。中國市場充電器通常缺乏所要求的需求側響應功能及符合ETSI EN 303 645的網絡安全控制措施，存在產品設計及合規文件方面的差距，且在中國監管體系中無對應規定。[UNVERIFIED — 在用於合規規劃前，請在gov.uk核實《智能充電點條例》的確切條例編號、合規聲明提交程序及當前OZEV核准名單標準]

mandatory_status.target: OZEV approved-chargepoint list: mandatory for grant-funded installations (commercial gate); Smart Charge Points Regs: mandatory for all new private charge points sold or installed in GB [UNVERIFIED — confirm scope and any exemptions]
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no approved-list scheme or smart-charge-point compliance statement requirement in China

source.publisher: UK Government / Office for Zero Emission Vehicles (OZEV)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] To access UK grant-supported installation channels, a chargepoint model must be listed on the OZEV approved-chargepoint list — a proactive manufacturer application process with no Chinese certification equivalent. Independently, the Smart Charge Points Regulations 2021 require all new private GB charge points to be smart (demand-side response, randomised delay, cyber security, compliance statement to government). These two requirements together represent a significant product-design and market-access barrier for Chinese manufacturers beyond UKCA safety marking. [UNVERIFIED — confirm current OZEV approved-list criteria, Smart Charge Points Regs SI number, and compliance statement process at gov.uk/ozev and legislation.gov.uk before relying on this for compliance planning]
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 要进入英国补贴支持的安装渠道，充电点型号须列入OZEV核准充电器名单——这是一套须由制造商主动申请的程序，中国任何认证均无法替代。此外，《2021年智能充电点条例》要求在大不列颠销售或安装的所有新型私用充电点须为智能充电点（需求侧响应、随机延迟、网络安全、向政府提交合规声明）。这两项要求共同构成中国制造商在UKCA安全标志之外面临的重大产品设计及市场准入障碍。[UNVERIFIED — 在将此内容用于合规规划前，请在gov.uk/ozev及legislation.gov.uk确认当前OZEV核准名单标准、《智能充电点条例》条例编号及合规声明程序]
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 要進入英國補貼支持的安裝渠道，充電點型號須列入OZEV核准充電器名單——這是一套須由製造商主動申請的程序，中國任何認證均無法替代。此外，《2021年智能充電點條例》要求在大不列顛銷售或安裝的所有新型私用充電點須為智能充電點（需求側響應、隨機延遲、網絡安全、向政府提交合規聲明）。這兩項要求共同構成中國製造商在UKCA安全標誌之外面臨的重大產品設計及市場準入障礙。[UNVERIFIED — 在將此內容用於合規規劃前，請在gov.uk/ozev及legislation.gov.uk確認當前OZEV核准名單標準、《智能充電點條例》條例編號及合規聲明程序]
